'''ât-l-z''' ('''katalaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vein|vein]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vein|vein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-l-z
|-
! Lemma
| katalaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitalaz|thitalaz]] || [[word:jitalaz|jitalaz]] || [[word:shitalaz|shitalaz]] || [[word:kitalaz|kitalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutalaz|thuthutalaz]] || [[word:jujutalaz|jujutalaz]] || [[word:shushutalaz|shushutalaz]] || [[word:kukutalaz|kukutalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutalaz|thutalaz]] || [[word:jutalaz|jutalaz]] || [[word:shutalaz|shutalaz]] || [[word:kutalaz|kutalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutalaz|thutalaz]] || [[word:jutalaz|jutalaz]] || [[word:shutalaz|shutalaz]] || [[word:kutalaz|kutalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetalaz|thetalaz]] || [[word:jetalaz|jetalaz]] || [[word:shetalaz|shetalaz]] || [[word:ketalaz|ketalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotalaz|thothotalaz]] || [[word:jojotalaz|jojotalaz]] || [[word:shoshotalaz|shoshotalaz]] || [[word:kokotalaz|kokotalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotalaz|thotalaz]] || [[word:jotalaz|jotalaz]] || [[word:shotalaz|shotalaz]] || [[word:kotalaz|kotalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotalaz|thotalaz]] || [[word:jotalaz|jotalaz]] || [[word:shotalaz|shotalaz]] || [[word:kotalaz|kotalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtalaz|thĂŠtalaz]] || [[word:jĂŠtalaz|jĂŠtalaz]] || [[word:shĂŠtalaz|shĂŠtalaz]] || [[word:kĂŠtalaz|kĂŠtalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatalaz|thathatalaz]] || [[word:jajatalaz|jajatalaz]] || [[word:shashatalaz|shashatalaz]] || [[word:kakatalaz|kakatalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatalaz|thatalaz]] || [[word:jatalaz|jatalaz]] || [[word:shatalaz|shatalaz]] || [[word:katalaz|katalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatalaz|thatalaz]] || [[word:jatalaz|jatalaz]] || [[word:shatalaz|shatalaz]] || [[word:katalaz|katalaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatalaz|shatalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatalaz|goshatalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatalaz|gokishatalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatalaznĂŒ|shatalaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatalaznknĂŒ|goshatalaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatalaznĂŒ|gokishatalaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatalazshĂ«|shatalazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatalaznkshĂ«|goshatalaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatalazshĂ«|gokishatalazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatalazro|shatalazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalaznkro|goshatalaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatalazro|gokishatalazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatalazmu|shatalazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalaznkmu|goshatalaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatalazmu|gokishatalazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatalazsher|shatalazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatalaznksher|goshatalaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatalazsher|gokishatalazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatalazng|shatalazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatalaznkng|goshatalaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatalazng|gokishatalazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatalazya|shatalazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatalaznkya|goshatalaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatalazya|gokishatalazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatalazyam|shatalazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatalaznkyam|goshatalaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatalazyam|gokishatalazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatalaznĂŒshĂ«|shatalaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatalaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshatalaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatalaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishatalaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatalaznĂŒro|shatalaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalaznknĂŒro|goshatalaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatalaznĂŒro|gokishatalaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatalaznĂŒmu|shatalaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalaznknĂŒmu|goshatalaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatalaznĂŒmu|gokishatalaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatalazshĂ«nĂŒ|shatalazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatalaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatalaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatalazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatalazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatalazshĂ«ro|shatalazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalaznkshĂ«ro|goshatalaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatalazshĂ«ro|gokishatalazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatalazshĂ«mu|shatalazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalaznkshĂ«mu|goshatalaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatalazshĂ«mu|gokishatalazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatalazronĂŒ|shatalazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatalaznkronĂŒ|goshatalaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatalazronĂŒ|gokishatalazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatalazroshĂ«|shatalazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatalaznkroshĂ«|goshatalaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatalazroshĂ«|gokishatalazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatalazromu|shatalazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatalaznkromu|goshatalaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatalazromu|gokishatalazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatalazmunĂŒ|shatalazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatalaznkmunĂŒ|goshatalaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatalazmunĂŒ|gokishatalazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatalazmushĂ«|shatalazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatalaznkmushĂ«|goshatalaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatalazmushĂ«|gokishatalazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatalazmuro|shatalazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatalaznkmuro|goshatalaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatalazmuro|gokishatalazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
